//: Standalone tsconfig for the Playwright e2e suite (S8). Kept OUT of the main tsconfig.json `include` so `tsc --noEmit` (the build/typecheck gate) does not typecheck browser specs nor pull in `@playwright/test` globals. Playwright runs its own TS via its config; ESLint's type-aware `projectService` resolves the e2e files to THIS project. Extends the same strict base so the specs are held to the repo's type bar.
